channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Guardians' Ben Lively left off the ALDS roster against the Tigers. Montero on, Mize off for Detroit
item.description: Ben Lively was left off Cleveland's roster for the AL Division Series against Detroit despite being an invaluable addition to the Guardians' starting rotation this season. The New York Yankees left off pitcher Marcus Stroman and reliever Mark Leiter Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Syracuse rallies to force overtime and beat No. 25 UNLV 44-41, spoiling Rebels' poll debut
item.description: LeQuint Allen powered into the end zone from a yard out in overtime to give Syracuse a 44-41 victory over No. 25 UNLV on Friday night, four days after the Rebels broke into the AP Top 25 for the first time in program history.
item.dc:creator: W.G. Ramirez, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Malik Nabers to miss Giants game at Seattle with concussion
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — The NFL's leading receiver Malik Nabers is out this week against Seattle, Giants coach Brian Daboll said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Twins senior VP and GM Thad Levine leaves team after 8 years
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Minnesota senior vice president and general manager Thad Levine is leaving the Twins after eight seasons with the club, the team said Friday. The Twins' statement said he was leaving to “pursue new challenges and opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFLPA to announce new program limiting locker room interviews after some players were seen 'naked on camera'
item.description: Several awkward encounters have prompted the NFLPA to propose a new program that will move player interviews outside the locker room, Bengals center and player rep Ted Karras said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ticket stub from Michael Jordan's NBA debut, 1998 game-worn jersey autograph card hit auction
item.description: Two rare Michael Jordan items, including a 1984 Bulls box office stub and a 1998 UD Basketball card, are up for auction in New York through October 19, along with other sports memorabilia including a 1914 Babe Ruth Orioles photo and a 1951 Bowman Mantle card.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs. Rams: Injuries, inactives and keys to Sunday's game at Soldier Field
item.description: Los Angeles Rams (1-2) at Chicago Bears (1-2) Sunday, Noon, FOX UPDATE: The Bears just released their list of inactives on X. Inactive for Sunday's game are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Dominique Robinson, DB Terrell Smith, OL Bill Murray and DL Zacch Pickens.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
